name: RaydenChart
description: Chart.js wrapper with Rayden UI theme defaults. Supports line, bar, pie, doughnut, radar, scatter, bubble, and polar-area chart types.

data.description: Chart.js data object with labels and datasets

width.description: Chart width in pixels (defaults to container width)

utilities.name: chartColors
utilities.description: Rayden UI color palette for charts (primary, secondary, grey, success, error, warning)

utilities.name: chartFont
utilities.description: Default font configuration for chart labels

utilities.name: hexToRgba
utilities.description: Utility to convert hex color to rgba: hexToRgba('#F56630', 0.5)

utilities.name: createGradientFill
utilities.description: Create gradient fill for chart areas

commonMistakes.correction: data={{ labels: [...], datasets: [...] }} (use Chart.js data format)
type='line' with fill: true in dataset

examples.title: Line Chart
examples.code:
<RaydenChart
  type="line"
  height={300}
  data={{
    labels: ['Jan', 'Feb', 'Mar', 'Apr', 'May'],
    datasets: [{
      label: 'Revenue',
      data: [3000, 4500, 3200, 5100, 4800],
      borderColor: chartColors.primary[500],
      backgroundColor: hexToRgba(chartColors.primary[500], 0.1),
      fill: true,
    }],
  }}
/>

examples.title: Bar Chart
examples.code:
<RaydenChart
  type="bar"
  height={250}
  data={{
    labels: ['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4'],
    datasets: [{
      label: 'Sales',
      data: [120, 190, 150, 220],
      backgroundColor: chartColors.primary[400],
    }],
  }}
/>

examples.title: Doughnut Chart
examples.code:
<RaydenChart
  type="doughnut"
  height={200}
  data={{
    labels: ['Desktop', 'Mobile', 'Tablet'],
    datasets: [{
      data: [55, 35, 10],
      backgroundColor: [
        chartColors.primary[500],
        chartColors.secondary[500],
        chartColors.grey[400],
      ],
    }],
  }}
/>

examples.title: Radar Chart
examples.code:
<RaydenChart
  type="radar"
  height={300}
  data={{
    labels: ['Speed', 'Reliability', 'Comfort', 'Safety', 'Efficiency'],
    datasets: [{
      label: 'Product A',
      data: [80, 90, 70, 85, 75],
      borderColor: chartColors.primary[500],
      backgroundColor: hexToRgba(chartColors.primary[500], 0.2),
    }],
  }}
/>

examples.title: Multiple Datasets
examples.code:
<RaydenChart
  type="line"
  height={300}
  data={{
    labels: ['Mon', 'Tue', 'Wed', 'Thu', 'Fri'],
    datasets: [
      {
        label: 'This Week',
        data: [100, 120, 115, 134, 168],
        borderColor: chartColors.primary[500],
      },
      {
        label: 'Last Week',
        data: [90, 100, 95, 110, 140],
        borderColor: chartColors.grey[400],
        borderDash: [5, 5],
      },
    ],
  }}
/>
